DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AMERICAN ROLLER BEARING COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: Susan Comstock, 563-1306 pltf & opposing party in pro per; Renee Welze Livingston, Esq. 925/287-8728 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AMERICAN ROLLER BEARING. NO RELATION BACK BECAUSE DOES'S NOT USED AND PLAINTIFF HAD KNOWLEDGE OF AMERICAN ROLLER IDENTITY AND POSSIBLE RELATION TO TRANSACTION). Deft to prepare order. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
